name: Apple & Herb Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook celery and onion in margarine until tender.
2. Add water and bouillon; cook until bouillon dissolves.
3. In a large bowl, combine remaining ingredients; add bouillon mixture.
4. Mix well.
5. Loosely stuff turkey just before roasting.
6. Place remaining stuffing in a greased baking dish; bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until hot.
7. Refrigerate leftovers.
NOTE: I use 1-3/4 cups chicken broth instead of hot water and bouillon.
